title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies!
